description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named On PRs - Windows Matrix that runs on pull requests, workflow dispatch, and push events to specific branches and tags. The workflow uses a concurrency group and cancels in-progress jobs. It defines three Windows jobs: windows, msys2, and cygwin, each with a matrix strategy for different build types, shared libraries, and platforms. Each job checks out the code, sets up the environment, and runs CMake to build and test the project.
